case_title: FRANCISCO CHAVEZ VS. YANNICK A. COINDOZ

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAVEZ, FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT COINDOZ, YANNICK A. DBA UNIQUE BISTRO JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAVEZ, FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COINDOZ, YANNICK A. DBA UNIQUE BISTRO $19,986.71 PRINCIPAL, $229.32 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $20,586.03, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
